title: Better Furnaces Reforged
description: A remake of the mod BetterFurnaces, with even faster furnaces
body:
[](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterfurnacesreforged) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterfurnacesreforged) [](https://files.minecraftforge.net/) [](https://fabricmc.net/) [](https://neoforged.net/) [](https://quiltmc.org/) This mod project plans to rewrite the [old Better Furnaces mod](https://www.9minecraft.net/better-furnaces-mod/) for the new versions, adapting it to the new Minecraft concepts, but without leaving its old look. The only currently supported versions are: **1.20.1, 1.20.4, 1.21.1, 1.21.3, 1.21.4 and 1.21.5**

*Feel free to [report issues](https://github.com/Wilyicaro/BetterFurnacesReforged/issues) or contribute [here](https://github.com/Wilyicaro/BetterFurnacesReforged), and to use this mod in modpacks!* *Also, you can follow the mod's development in detail and see how it's progressing on the [Kyubion Studios server](https://discord.gg/cdZg5aYfMM).* ### Furnaces (each can be upgraded to the next tier and have upgrades like Liquid Fuel, Fuel Efficiency, and Processing) - Copper Furnace (1.14x speed) - Iron Furnace (1.33x speed) - Steel Furnace (1.6x speed) - Gold Furnace (2x speed) - Amethyst Furnace (3x speed) - Diamond Furnace (4x speed) - Platinum Furnace (8x speed) - Netherhot Furnace (25x speed) - Extreme Furnace (50x speed) - Ultimate Furnace (200x speed) *Each of these speed tiers can be configured in `/serverconfig/betterfurnacesreforged.json` file* ### Forges (like their furnace counterparts, but they can smelt 3 separate items at a time, and can also be upgraded) - Copper Forge (1.14x3 speed) - Iron Forge (1.33x3 speed) - Steel Forge (1.6x3 speed) - Gold Forge (2x3 speed) - Amethyst Forge (3x3 speed) - Diamond Forge (4x3 speed) - Platinum Forge (8x3 speed) - Netherhot Forge (25x3 speed) - Extreme Forge (50x3 speed) - Ultimate Forge (200x3 speed) ### Upgrades (advanced upgrades are unbreakable, while regular upgrades that double something can break after usage) - (Advanced) Fuel Efficiency - doubles the amount that each fuel can smelt - (Advanced) Ore Processing - doubles the amount that each smelted item yields - Auto Input/Output - items automatically enter or exit nearby inventories - Redstone Signal - controls furnace or forge operation based on redstone signals - Factory - combines the Auto Input/Output and Redstone Signal upgrades - Color - change the color of the furnace (right click to configure) - Blasting/Smoking - change the furnace type to blast furnace or smoker for their specific bonuses - Fuel Liquid - use liquid fuel like lava buckets instead of solid fuel - Energy - uses Energy instead of fuel - XP Tank - turns resulting experience points into liquid experience points in a created tank - Generator - instead of smelting items, this furnace will generate Energy from water evaporation - Storage - adds an extra storage slot for fuel, input, and output - Ultimate Ore Processing - quadruples infinitely the amount that each smelted ore type yields - Tier upgrades - furnaces can be upgraded in-place to the next tier without having to break and replace it - TheFrogMC (Original mod creator) - Qelifern (Iron Furnaces creator)

[](https://www.bisecthosting.com/kybwily/)
